## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Keep this brief; the commit message
     generated by git-agent already describes the mechanics. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new capability
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: no behavior change
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] chore: tooling, config, dependencies
- [ ] test: test coverage
- [ ] perf: performance
- [ ] ci: CI pipeline

## Checklist

- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] No secrets in diff (run `git diff --cached | grep -iE 'token|secret|key|password'` locally before push)
- [ ] If this changes the tool surface, PRD.md in Working KB was updated too
